description: CompositionBlack square neck top made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with elasticated cuffs, and a laced and pleated neck FitRegularWash careMachine wash or hand wash separately in mild detergentDo not bleach or wring dryDry in shadeMedium iron; do not iron on decorationsDon the boho chic look in a really cool way with this trendy top from jealous 21. The laced and pleated neckline coupled with elasticated cuffs adds a stylish feminine vibe, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims and heeled sandals.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
